label: AppleScript • scripted identifier via {{target}}
query: Set the body of the provided note to the provided body.
notes: Model-free CI anchor for the identifier-fidelity path (the fix for the liveProof note-name typo). The exact, easily-mistyped note NAME is passed as the {{target}} literal alongside the {{body}} literal; the canned script references both placeholders, the loop expands them to correctly-escaped literals, and the mock 'app world' records the write under the exact seeded name. Proves an identifier — not just body text — can round-trip verbatim via a placeholder. No tokens.
